steps.t: Lothíriel has asked you to speak with Nosseth and Naremil in the Library of Saphadzîr. The Library is in Dol Amroth.
Nosseth and Naremil have told you to look for books on Rohan on the second floor of the southern wing of the the Library of Saphadzîr. The Library is …
You managed to find a few books referring to Rohan for Lothíriel. You should bring them to her in the Court of the Prince, in Dol Amroth.
